faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Bulls Head, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Bulls Head residents most frequently encounter pavement ants, odorous house ants, and carpenter ants. Pavement ants typically nest under sidewalks and driveways, while carpenter ants can damage wooden structures in older homes. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to apply the most effective treatment method for your situation.
